title: hot member upgrade
manager: Live member replacement in a running system — retire a member with a snapshot, lift it through `migrates from`, and restart it from the v2 factory inside dispatch, without stopping the system. With supervision and the migration machinery already in place, hot upgrade simply falls out: a fleet can be upgraded member by member while it keeps serving, no maintenance window required.
cs: hot upgrade = retire-with-snapshot -> lift (W9.3) -> restart from v2 factory inside dispatch; live member replacement; builds on supervision (W7.20) + migration (W9.3).
